title: Target Sum Matcher
summary: Given a list of integers and a target, decide if any two distinct items sum to it.

title: Bubble Sort
summary: Sort a list of integers in ascending order.

title: Double Trouble
summary: Read an integer and print double its value.

title: Insertion Sort
summary: Sort a list of integers in ascending order using insertion sort.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
summary: Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence in an array of integers.

title: Valid Parentheses
summary: Check whether a string of brackets is properly balanced.

title: Binary Search
summary: Find the index of a target value in a sorted array using binary search.

title: Reverse a Linked List
summary: Build a singly linked list and print its values in reversed order.

title: GCD via Recursion
summary: Compute the greatest common divisor of two integers using recursion.

title: First Non-Repeating Character
summary: Find the first character in a string that doesn't repeat.
